Channel.Description: Serial number
Module ID
Hardware variant
Firmware version
Wear level of storage medium in percent
Mode switch
Battery status CPU (0 = battery low or missing, 1 = battery ok,)
Temperature CPU [1/10C]
Temperature cooling plate [1/10C]
System time at the start of the current task cycle [µs]
I/O power supply warning (0 = DC OK)
Bus current 0.1 A X2X Link IF6
Bus voltage 0.1 V X2X Link IF6
Node switch
Link state
Margin to output cycle deadline in microseconds
Node number currently in use (255 = invalid)
Indication for proper cyclic operation (1 = operational)
Indication for a synchronized POWERLINK-system (1 = synchronized)
Absolute time extracted from current SoC-Frame (NetTime in POWERLINK V2) - Seconds
Absolute time extracted from current SoC-Frame (NetTime in POWERLINK V2) - Nanoseconds
Network time extracted from current SoC-Frame [µs] (RelativeTime in POWERLINK V2)
Network time offset to local system time [µs]
Overall number of bus cycles
Number of failed bus cycles
Number of cycle time violations
Unoccupied time during one POWERLINK cycle [µs]
allways 0, available for legacy projects
Number of bus cycles
Number of bus cycles with set break signal
Timestamp when the current input frame was started [µs]
Number of failed synchronous frames
Number of memory access errors within synchronous frame (overflow/underrun)
Number of not sent synchronous frames (sender not ready)
Number of not received synchronous frames (timeout)
Number of faulty synchronous frames
Number of synchronous frames which could not be sent because of receiving a frame
Number of failed asynchronous frames
Number of memory access errors within asynchronous frame (overflow/underrun)
Number of not sent asynchronous frames (sender not ready)
Number of not received asynchronous frames (timeout)
Number of faulty asynchronous frames
Number of asynchronous frames which could not be sent because of receiving a frame
Number of cycles when DMA for cyclic outputs was too late
Number of max. stations
Number of configured stations
Station at end of bus
Time of last change at station on end of bus
First station which recognizes output frame error
Time of last change of channel StationPastOutFrameError
First station which recognizes input frame error
Time of last change of channel StationPastInFrameError
Size of synchronous input frame [Bytes]
Size of synchronous output frame [Bytes]
Size of asynchronous frame [Bytes]
Size reserve within asynchronous frame [Bytes]
Configured bus length [m]
Module status (1 = module present)
Serial number
Module ID
Hardware variant
Firmware version
Number of lost Rx-Frames
Number of received oversized frames > 1500 Bytes
Number of Rx-Frames with wrong CRC
Number of lost Rx-Frames due to performance shortage on BC
Number of collisions on ethernet while BC sending
Link of interface 1 is active
Increments each time when link of physical interface 1 is lost
Link of interface 2 is active
Increments each time when link of physical interface 2 is lost
Nettime of cycle receiving the Poll Response of the station
Number of bus cycles
Number of bus cycles with set break signal
Number of failed synchronous frames
Number of not sent synchronous frames (sender not ready)
Number of not received synchronous frames (timeout)
Number of faulty synchronous frames
Number of synchronous frames which could not be sent because of receiving a frame
Number of failed asynchronous frames
Number of not sent asynchronous frames (sender not ready)
Number of not received asynchronous frames (timeout)
Number of faulty asynchronous frames
Number of asynchronous frames which could not be sent because of receiving a frame
Hardware configuration changed: module disconnected while operational
Hardware configuration changed: new module detected while operational
Station at end of bus
Time of last change at station on end of bus

Number of configured stations

Serial number
Module ID
Hardware variant
Firmware version
All the parameters and frequency bands are filled with new values at the same time (approximately once every 300 ms). The value of this output toggles if the datapoints are filled with new values
Broken wire channel 1
Broken wire channel 2
Broken wire channel 3
Broken wire channel 4
Overflow analog input channel 1 (1 = measurand exceeds the configured value in AnalogInputScale, measured with a 100mV/g sensor)
Overflow analog input channel 2 (1 = measurand exceeds the configured value in AnalogInputScale, measured with a 100mV/g sensor)
Overflow analog input channel 3 (1 = measurand exceeds the configured value in AnalogInputScale, measured with a 100mV/g sensor)
Overflow analog input channel 4 (1 = measurand exceeds the configured value in AnalogInputScale, measured with a 100mV/g sensor)
Overflow channel 1 (1 = overflow of parameter or frequency band)
Overflow channel 2 (1 = overflow of parameter or frequency band)
Overflow channel 3 (1 = overflow of parameter or frequency band)
Overflow channel 4 (1 = overflow of parameter or frequency band)
Overflow bits for the characteristic values of channel 1
Overflow bits for the characteristic values of channel 2
Overflow bits for the characteristic values of channel 3
Overflow bits for the characteristic values of channel 4
Overflow bits for the frequency bands
Actual speed 01 [Hz]
Actual speed 02 [Hz]
Actual speed 03 [Hz]
Actual speed 04 [Hz]
Sensor sensitivity [mV/g] channel 1
Enable of calculation of AnalogInput01
Toggles with every new calculation of AnalogInput01
Analog input channel 1
RMS value of the velocity spectrum from 10 Hz to 1kHz as defined in the ISO 10816 [mm/s], channel 1
RMS Value of the acceleration raw signal from MinFrequencyRaw to MaxFrequencyRaw [mg], channel 1
RMS Value of the acceleration envelope signal from MinFrequencyEnvelope to MaxFrequencyEnvelope [mg], channel 1
RMS Value of the velocity raw signal from MinFrequencyRaw to MaxFrequencyRaw [mm/s], channel 1 (0 = calculation of velocity signal is disabled)
RMS Value of the velocity envelope signal from MinFrequencyEnvelope to MaxFrequencyEnvelope [mm/s], channel 1 (0 = calculation of velocity signal is disabled)
Absolute maximum value of the raw signal from 0 Hz to MaxFrequencyRaw [mg], channel 1
Reference of the absolute maximum value of the raw signal for calculation of VDI 3832 K(t) [mg], channel 1
RMS value of the raw signal from 0 Hz to MaxFrequencyRaw [mg], channel 1
Reference of the RMS value of the raw signal for calculation of VDI 3832 K(t) [mg], channel 1
Crest-Factor (Ratio of the absolute maximum value to the RMS value) of the raw signal from 0 Hz to MaxFrequencyRaw [1], channel 1
Kurtosis (4th statistical moment) of the raw signal from 0 Hz to MaxFrequencyRaw [1], channel 1
Skewnes (3rd statistical moment) of the raw signal from 0 Hz to MaxFrequencyRaw [1], channel 1
Ratio of the refernce values to the actual measured values of the raw signal as defined in VDI 3832 [1], channel 1
Used absolute maximum reference value of the raw signal for calculation of VDI 3832 [mg], channel 1
Used RMS reference value of the raw signal for calculation of VDI 3832 [mg], channel 1
